MessageTitle: (Updated) Microsoft Entra ID SSPR will require registered authentication methods starting September 7, 2026
WhyItMatters: Self-service password reset will stop working for any user who has not registered an authentication method by this date. Directly relevant to SMLC's upcoming Conditional Access/MFA work - admins need to make sure every user has a registered method before the deadline, or those users risk being locked out of password reset and needing a manual admin reset instead.
